<!-- Thanks for opening a pull request! Please fill in this checklist. -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link to any related issue, e.g. "Closes #123". Delete if not applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Docs / refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the changed behaviour
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass locally
- [ ] `mypy` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest -m "not integration"` passes locally
- [ ] Public-API changes are reflected in `README.md`
- [ ] An entry has been added to `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
